creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
(In reply to Konstantin Belousov from comment #5)

Usually I prefer to wait for the next realease of Valgrind (which will be 3.24 in about a months time) for devel/valgrind.

In the meantime I recommend either using devel/valgrind-devel (after this patch lands) or if you want the bleedong edge building directly from source.

If there's a problem I'll make a patch for devel/valgrind.
